title: Magical Mexican French Corn Galette
description: A funky, chewy, crowd-pleaser French dish featuring corn tortillas, stone-bowl-dolsot, and dash-friendly ingredients in a galette form, this Magical Mexican French Corn Galette is perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the corn tortillas to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large skillet, heat the melted butter over medium heat and cook the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the frozen corn kernels, grated cheese, chopped fresh cilantro, salt, and black pepper.
Arrange the rolled-out corn tortillas in a galette pattern on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spoon the corn and cheese mixture onto the center of the tortillas, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the tortillas up over the filling to form a crust.
Bake the galette for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
